title: Phone Login - Verify validation for phone number with more than 10 digits
description: Tests that the system shows an error for phone numbers longer than 10 digits. The UI should ideally prevent this input.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Attempt to enter an 11-digit number (e.g., '12345678901') in the input field.
2. Verify if the input field stops accepting input after 10 digits.
3. If more than 10 digits can be entered, tap the 'लॉगिन करें' button.
4. Observe the screen for an error message.

expected_result: Ideally, the input field should have a max length of 10. If not, an error message 'Invalid phone number' is displayed upon tapping login.
